chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rulings Regarding Male Slaves and Female Bondwoman

text: 4565 - : وَ سُئِلَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْمَمْلُوكِ مَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ مِنَ اَلنِّسَاءِ قَالَ "حُرَّتَيْنِ أَوْ أَرْبَعَ إِمَاءٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4565 - Imam (as) was asked about what is permissible for a male slave in terms of women.
Imam (as) said: "Two free women or four bondwomen."
